---
title: "Teaching & Roles"
---

## Teaching

I teach across undergraduate and postgraduate psychology, with experience in research methods, assessment, counselling-related content, and professional practice.

My teaching focuses on helping students engage critically with psychological theory, research, and applied practice.

## Recent teaching and academic roles

### RMIT University
Sessional tutor and academic support across undergraduate and postgraduate psychology units.

### Cairnmillar Institute
Associate Lecturer supporting honours-level teaching, marking, and research methods learning.

## Practice and school-based roles

### CatholicCare Victoria
Provisional Psychologist in an industry-linked context connected to school attendance and student wellbeing.

### Sacred Heart Primary School, Kew
School Counsellor.

## Broader professional experience

My background also includes work in accessibility, education support, health and safety, and student-facing service roles. These experiences continue to shape how I think about systems, communication, and applied psychological work.
